summary: Sprint 3 Regression Guard Tests fully verified. All 28 battle tests pass (10 Sprint 1 booking integrity + 10 Sprint 2 hold/OOO + 8 Sprint 3 regression guards). Past-date booking rejection, navigation visibility, and date validation bugs are now permanently guarded.
critical_code_review_comments: Regression Guards (test_regression_guards.py) correctly test 8 historical bug fixes as release blockers
REG-1: Past date booking rejection via quick-booking endpoint returns 400 with Turkish error message
REG-2: Deeply past date (30 days) also correctly rejected
REG-3: Future date booking succeeds (200) - ensures fix didn't break valid bookings
REG-4: Checkout before checkin correctly rejected (400)
REG-5: Login returns user role and tenant_id for navigation module visibility
REG-6: Same-day checkin succeeds (200 or 409 if room already booked)
REG-7: Core PMS endpoints (dashboard, rooms, bookings, guests) accessible after login
Past date validation in create_reservation_service.py (lines 65-80) uses effective_min_date = max(business_date, today)
Rate limiter in apm_middleware.py correctly checks TESTING=1 or APP_ENV=development for relaxed limits
CI/CD pipeline (ci-cd.yml) includes all 3 battle test files in curated suite
ADR-002 Test Quarantine Strategy document provides clear T0/T1/T2 tier classification

success_rate.backend: 100% - 28/28 battle tests passed (10 Sprint 1 + 10 Sprint 2 + 8 Sprint 3)

seed_data_creation: Tests use unique year ranges (2050-2090) to avoid date collisions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 3 Regression Guards fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) 8 regression guard tests for past-date booking, navigation visibility, and date validation bugs, (2) CI/CD pipeline includes all battle tests as hard gates, (3) Rate limiter uses TESTING=1 or APP_ENV=development for relaxed limits during tests, (4) ADR-002 documents test quarantine strategy with T0/T1/T2 tiers. All 28 battle tests pass.

test_past_date_booking_rejected_quick_bo.notes: REG-1: Yesterday's check-in returns 400 with 'gecmis' in error message

test_future_date_booking_succeeds.notes: REG-3: Future date booking returns 200, cleanup via cancel

test_login_returns_user_role_and_modules.notes: REG-5: Login response includes access_token, user.role, user.tenant_id

test_pms_module_accessible_after_login.notes: REG-5: PMS dashboard, rooms, bookings endpoints return 200

test_same_day_checkin_succeeds.notes: REG-6: Today's check-in returns 200 or 409 (if room booked)

test_core_endpoints_accessible.notes: REG-7: All core PMS endpoints return 200 with valid auth

regression_guards_in_ci.notes: tests/battle/test_regression_guards.py added to ci-cd.yml curated suite

security_scan_tightening.notes: pip-audit, yarn audit, Trivy CRITICAL scan, hardcoded secrets check all configured

rate_limiter_test_mode.notes: TESTING=1 or APP_ENV=development triggers 10000 req/min limits

adr_document.notes: T0 (battle tests), T1 (curated CI), T2 (quarantine) tiers defined
